news.title:
Cochin Shipyard and HBL Engineering form JV to develop electric mobility, energy storage tech for maritime sector.
The JV focuses on marine batteries, BMS, electric motors, power electronics, and charging infrastructure.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard and HBL Engineering form JV to develop electric mobility, energy storage tech for maritime sector.
The JV focuses on marine batteries, BMS, electric motors, power electronics, and charging infrastructure.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard forms JV with HBL Engineering for electric mobility tech.
JV named 'Green Maritime Propulsion Pvt Ltd', Cochin holds 40%, HBL 60%.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard forms JV with HBL Engineering for electric mobility tech.
JV named 'Green Maritime Propulsion Pvt Ltd', Cochin holds 40%, HBL 60%.

news.title:
India's Rs 70,000 crore shipbuilding push boosts domestic shipyards like Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard, and GRSE.
Mazagon Dock leads with Rs 23,758 crore order book, while Cochin Shipyard's Rs 23,000 crore backlog highlights robust commercial prospects.
news.summary:
India's Rs 70,000 crore shipbuilding push boosts domestic shipyards like Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard, and GRSE.
Mazagon Dock leads with Rs 23,758 crore order book, while Cochin Shipyard's Rs 23,000 crore backlog highlights robust commercial prospects.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) and HD Hyundai plan a $500M JV to build a state-of-the-art block fabrication facility in Kerala, creating 2,000 direct jobs.
The JV aligns with India's 'Make in India' initiative, aiming to boost shipbuilding capacity, reduce import reliance, and enhance global competitiveness.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) and HD Hyundai plan a $500M JV to build a state-of-the-art block fabrication facility in Kerala, creating 2,000 direct jobs.
The JV aligns with India's 'Make in India' initiative, aiming to boost shipbuilding capacity, reduce import reliance, and enhance global competitiveness.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.

news.title: Cochin Shipyard signs ₹2000 Cr deal with CMA CGM for 6 LNG-fueled feeder ships.
news.summary: Cochin Shipyard signs ₹2000 Cr deal with CMA CGM for 6 LNG-fueled feeder ships.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy vessel contract; Lupin partners with Spektus Pharma for DeslaFlex in Canada.
JSW Infra plans equity raising; Delhivery to deploy 150 EVs; Embassy Developments enters Alibaug market with luxury project.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy vessel contract; Lupin partners with Spektus Pharma for DeslaFlex in Canada.
JSW Infra plans equity raising; Delhivery to deploy 150 EVs; Embassy Developments enters Alibaug market with luxury project.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy contract to build 5 NGSVs.
Q3 results: Net profit down 18.3% YoY; revenue up 17.7%, EBITDA falls 21.5%.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy contract to build 5 NGSVs.
Q3 results: Net profit down 18.3% YoY; revenue up 17.7%, EBITDA falls 21.5%.

news.title: Cochin Shipyard chosen as top bidder for 5 advanced survey ships, order worth ₹50B.
news.summary: Cochin Shipyard chosen as top bidder for 5 advanced survey ships, order worth ₹50B.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) declared L1 for constructing 5 Next Generation Survey Vessels for Indian Navy.
The project, worth ~Rs. 5,000 crore, awaits formalities completion for final contract confirmation.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) declared L1 for constructing 5 Next Generation Survey Vessels for Indian Navy.
The project, worth ~Rs. 5,000 crore, awaits formalities completion for final contract confirmation.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard shares rose 1.2% to ₹1,629.8 after securing a ₹250 crore green tug order from Polestar Maritime.
Q3 results showed an 18.3% profit drop to ₹144.6 crore, with 17.7% revenue growth to ₹1,350.4 crore. ₹3.5 interim dividend declared.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard shares rose 1.2% to ₹1,629.8 after securing a ₹250 crore green tug order from Polestar Maritime.
Q3 results showed an 18.3% profit drop to ₹144.6 crore, with 17.7% revenue growth to ₹1,350.4 crore. ₹3.5 interim dividend declared.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard secures a major order for two green tugs valued at ₹100-250 crore.
The order is from a local client, highlighting the company's growing domestic presence.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard secures a major order for two green tugs valued at ₹100-250 crore.
The order is from a local client, highlighting the company's growing domestic presence.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) secured an order from Polestar Maritime for two Green Tugs under GTTP.
Tugs with 60T Bollard Pull to be delivered by Aug and Sep 2027; order classified as 'Notable'.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd (CSL) secured an order from Polestar Maritime for two Green Tugs under GTTP.
Tugs with 60T Bollard Pull to be delivered by Aug and Sep 2027; order classified as 'Notable'.

news.title:
India's first mega shipbuilding cluster, NSHIP TN, launched under a ₹19,989-cr scheme.
NSHIP TN is a 50:50 JV between VOC Port (GoI) and SIPCOT (Tamil Nadu).
news.summary:
India's first mega shipbuilding cluster, NSHIP TN, launched under a ₹19,989-cr scheme.
NSHIP TN is a 50:50 JV between VOC Port (GoI) and SIPCOT (Tamil Nadu).

news.title: Cochin Shipyard's board opts for domestic borrowing over issuing $50M debt.
news.summary: Cochin Shipyard's board opts for domestic borrowing over issuing $50M debt.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard's board approves acquiring 23% stake in Conoship International.
This strategic move aims to strengthen Cochin Shipyard's European operations.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard's board approves acquiring 23% stake in Conoship International.
This strategic move aims to strengthen Cochin Shipyard's European operations.

news.title: Cochin Shipyard forms JV with HBL Engineering for electric transport and energy storage in marine industry.
news.summary: Cochin Shipyard forms JV with HBL Engineering for electric transport and energy storage in marine industry.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard's Q3 EBITDA declines to 1.7B Rs from 2.4B Rs YoY.
EBITDA margin drops to 14.3% in Q3, down from 22.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard's Q3 EBITDA declines to 1.7B Rs from 2.4B Rs YoY.
EBITDA margin drops to 14.3% in Q3, down from 22.5% YoY.

news.title:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.

news.title:
PM Modi to launch ₹830 cr infra projects in Bengal, including Balagarh cargo terminal and electric catamaran by Cochin Shipyard Ltd.
Projects include rail connectivity enhancements, Amrit Bharat Express trains, and political focus on Singur's industrial legacy ahead of elections.
news.summary:
PM Modi to launch ₹830 cr infra projects in Bengal, including Balagarh cargo terminal and electric catamaran by Cochin Shipyard Ltd.
Projects include rail connectivity enhancements, Amrit Bharat Express trains, and political focus on Singur's industrial legacy ahead of elections.
